title: taraxacum subalpinum
intro: Taraxacum subalpinum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of liver and gallbladder issues, such as jaundice. The health benefits of Taraxacum subalpinum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions like acne and eczema. Taraxacum subalpinum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
